title: Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple
tagline: Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Varadharaja Perumal Temple is a 500 year old vaishnavite temple at Nallur neighbourhood in Tiruvannamalai of Tamil Nadu state in India.
overview.description: Varadharaja Perumal Temple is a 500 year old vaishnavite temple at Nallur neighbourhood in Tiruvannamalai of Tamil Nadu state in India. The presiding deity in this temple is Sundara Varadharaja Perumal and goddess is Sundaravalli Thaayaar. Garudaallhvar is at the feet of the main deity in worshipping posture.

topPlaces.name: Kandiyanallur
topPlaces.description: Kandiyanallur is a village located south west of Chennai in Tamil Nadu, India. It is a part of Vandavasi Taluk in the district of Thiruvannamalai.

topPlaces.name: Orathy
topPlaces.description: Orathy is a village in Madurantakam taluk, Chengalpattu district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are more than 3000 inhabitants as of 2011.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (103 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nallur Sundara Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nallur, Tiruvannamalai, Kandiyanallur, Orathy.
